# ATX AI Lab

> ATX AI Lab provides hands-on AI training, consulting, and implementation for small businesses across the Austin metro. Founded by TJ Larkin, we serve Austin, South Austin, East Austin, West Austin, Lakeway, Bee Cave, Westlake, and Rollingwood.

## About

ATX AI Lab is led by TJ Larkin, an AI consultant and media operator based in Liberty Hill, Texas. TJ runs a 145,000+ subscriber newsletter network, co-founded lightbreak.ai, and builds with Claude Code, ChatGPT, voice agents, and workflow automation daily.

Services: 75-minute AI Consulting Sessions ($299), AI On Call monthly advisory ($799/month), and on-site team AI training (custom quoted) for businesses across the Austin metro area.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.atxailab.com/): Services overview, founder bio, and booking
- [About TJ Larkin](https://www.atxailab.com/about): Founder background, experience, credentials
- [Services](https://www.atxailab.com/services): Full breakdown of AI Consulting, AI On Call, On-Site Training
- [Contact](https://www.atxailab.com/contact): Booking and application
- [Blog](https://www.atxailab.com/blog): Practical AI articles for local business owners

## Sister Sites

ATX AI Lab's sister site [WilCo AI Lab](https://www.wilcoailab.com) covers Williamson County — Round Rock, Georgetown, Cedar Park, Leander, Pflugerville, Hutto, Taylor, and Liberty Hill. [SATX AI Lab](https://www.satxailab.com) covers the San Antonio metro — San Antonio, Alamo Heights, Stone Oak, Schertz, Converse, New Braunfels, and Boerne. Same services, same pricing, same founder.
